instruction: In System Settings, turn Dock automatic hiding {STATE}.
source: cove-original (design 047 §7 Tier-A defaults boolean com.apple.dock autohide).

args: defaults write com.apple.dock autohide -bool {BASELINE}; killall cfprefsd 2>/dev/null || true
if [ {STATE} = on ]; then defaults write com.apple.dock autohide -bool true; else defaults write com.apple.dock autohide -bool false; fi; killall cfprefsd 2>/dev/null || true
